title: Meet the Villa fan running 11 marathons in 11 days for charity
podcast_name: Claret & Blue - An Aston Villa Podcast
summary: Villa fan Harvey Knight is aiming to raise £11,000 for charity by running 11 marathons in 11 consecutive days. Harvey's running route is inspired by his favourite player, Ollie Watkins,  starting in Exeter, moving on to Weston-super-Mare and Brentford, before finishing at Villa.
